name: Draselea the Blood Tree Dragon Princess
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>血</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>樹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ドラセレア
desc: You can send 1 Level 4 or lower Plant monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Draselea the Blood Tree Dragon Princess"; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, its Level becomes the sent monster's. You can banish this card and 1 Plant monster from your GY; Special Summon 1 Dragon monster from your hand or GY. You can only use each effect of "Draselea the Blood Tree Dragon Princess" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon the turn you activate either of this card's effects, except Dragon or Plant monsters.
mnst_eff: You can send 1 Level 4 or lower Plant monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Draselea the Blood Tree Dragon Princess"; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, its Level becomes the sent monster's. You can banish this card and 1 Plant monster from your GY; Special Summon 1 Dragon monster from your hand or GY. You can only use each effect of "Draselea the Blood Tree Dragon Princess" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon the turn you activate either of this card's effects, except Dragon or Plant monsters.

mentions: Draselea the Blood Tree Dragon Princess
action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
